name: Chili-Spiced Beef and Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless Beef Top Sirloin Steak
1 Med Orange (Or Apple), cut in pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to package directions, adding 1 tsp Spicy Seasoning.
- This should yield about 2 cups of cooked rice.
2. Heat a 10-inch nonstick frying pan over medium heat for 5 minutes.
3. Rub 1 tsp seasoning onto both sides of the steak. Pan-broil the steak for 12 to 14 minutes, turning once until it reaches your desired level of doneness (rare to medium). Season with salt if desired.
4. Meanwhile, combine cooked rice, fruit pieces, sliced onions, and chopped walnuts in a bowl or container.
5. Once the steak is done, carve it into 1/4 inch thick slices.
6. Arrange the beef slices and rice mixture on individual plates or a serving platter.
